---
ID: US-OLV-052
Title: Review parsed transcripts
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Introduce shared OliverDock and upload flows

As a account manager
I want to edit parsed transcript data before writing
So that AI or parser output can be corrected before it affects records

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Parse result cards offer Review & Edit.
- [ ] TranscriptReviewModal allows editing metadata, actions, decisions, and notes.
- [ ] Users can add and remove parsed rows.
- [ ] Confirm merges edited values back into the payload.

Notes: Review modal is shared by the upload pipeline.
---
